parsed.explanation: Corrected encoding errors (mojibake) replacing unicode escape sequences with proper German umlauts (ö, ü). Added missing <BIBL> tags around 'Reich der Todten' to maintain structural consistency with other book entries. Normalized whitespace in 'Schweitzer-Chronick' and merged hyphenated line-break 'Commission'.
